fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Louisiana Physical Therapist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a physical therapist? Here's whether your license transfers to Louisiana - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: physical therapist license reciprocity louisiana, how to transfer physical therapist license to louisiana, physical therapist compact louisiana, louisiana physical therapist endorsement application

board.name: Louisiana Board of Physical Therapy Examiners
board.mailing_address: 9643 Brookline Ave., Ste. 101, Baton Rouge, LA 70809

license_types.title: PT, DPT
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice as a physical therapist in Louisiana.

steps.title: Create Account and Select Application Type
steps.description: Visit the 'New Applicants' section on the Louisiana Board of Physical Therapy Examiners website (www.laptboard.org), then create an account within the LA Board of Physical Therapy Examiners Online Portal and select the appropriate application for PT by Endorsement.

steps.title: Complete Online Application and Pay Fee
steps.description: Log into the LA Board of Physical Therapy Examiners Online Portal, fill out all required sections of the application completely, and submit the initial application fee electronically.

steps.title: Submit Required Documentation
steps.description: Provide official transcripts from your physical therapy program, NPTE scores (if applicable), and arrange for verification of licensure from all states where you currently hold or have ever held a PT license. All documents should be sent directly from the source to the Louisiana Board of Physical Therapy Examiners.

steps.title: Complete Jurisprudence Exam
steps.description: Pass the Louisiana Jurisprudence Examination, which can be taken online through the LA Board of Physical Therapy Examiners Online Portal. This exam covers the Louisiana Physical Therapy Practice Act and rules.

steps.title: Submit Background Check
steps.description: Complete a criminal background check as required by the Board. Instructions for the fingerprinting and background check process will be provided within the LA Board of Physical Therapy Examiners Online Portal application.

steps.title: Application Review and Approval
steps.description: The Louisiana Board of Physical Therapy Examiners will review your complete application and all supporting documents. Once approved, your license will be issued.

documents.detail: Sent directly from your educational institution.
Official verification of passing the NPTE (National Physical Therapy Examination).

provisional_text: Many states offer a limited permit or provisional license for new graduates waiting to take the NPTE. Check specific board rules for supervisory requirements.
reciprocity_text: Physical Therapists licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current certification.

faqs.question: How much does a Louisiana physical therapist license cost?
faqs.answer: For endorsement applicants, the state licensing fee is $300. Additional third-party costs (fingerprinting, transcripts, or verification) may apply.

faqs.question: Is national certification required?
faqs.answer: Yes, passing the NPTE (National Physical Therapy Examination) is a standard requirement for initial licensure across almost all states.

faqs.question: Does Louisiana have reciprocity for physical therapists?
faqs.answer: Yes. Louisiana participates in the PT Compact. If your home state and license qualify for compact privilege, you can typically practice in Louisiana without a separate endorsement application.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my physical therapist license to Louisiana?
faqs.answer: Current board processing time is 4 to 6 Weeks once your file is complete.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Louisiana while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Physical Therapists licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current certification.

hero.title: Become a Physical Therapist in Louisiana
hero.dek: To apply for a Physical Therapist license in Louisiana, new applicants must create an account and complete an application through the LA Board of Physical Therapy Examiners Online Portal.

official_links.portal_name: LA Board of Physical Therapy Examiners Online Portal
official_links.registration_steps: To start an application, navigate to the 'New Applicants' section on the LA Board of Physical Therapy Examiners website and select the appropriate application type (e.g., PT by Examination, PT by Endorsement). You will then be directed to create an account or log in to the online portal to begin filling out the application.
